all, what inarnation is a mashup? Well,
actually mashup was a thing before AI.
And put simply, a mashup is just
whenever you take the element of one
song and mix it together with the
element of another song. For instance,
if you put a Taylor Swift vocal over a
Big Shawn instrumental, or in my case, I
actually did a mashup/remix a few months
ago where I took the instrumental from
John Cena's entrance and put Little
Wayne's vocals on top of it.
>> You got to admit that's crazy, ain't it?

good news is they want to encourage

limited time, each generation is only
going to cost you half a credit. There
are two ways to do a mashup. one, you
can drag a song over here to remix and
then you now have the option to choose
mashup or you can click the three dots
on a song, go to remix/edit and choose
mashup. So, I'm just going to select
